productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Unisex Blended Grey Backpack
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better backpack you can find than this one from united colors of benetton. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space and a large compartment, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to college or office. Height: 33.5 cm Width: 21 cm Depth: 46 cm Made of polyester with a nylon lining for durability, toughness and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag Utility pocket on the front with organizing pouches, loop and mobile pouch with velcro closure Another utility pouch below it with zippered insert pocket on it Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Care Do not machine wash
